title: AnimateCraft: Lankeren
description: Make the game more animation-like and immersive, with the an Original Story about  Minecraft epic history and your RPG adventure, and beyond.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/rqoNUSYX/images/c6d69db2d7cb94363460cd398e763e785fa6277d.png)

<details>
<summary>📜中文简介 | Chinese Description</summary>


南朝梁任昉《述异记》载，樵夫王质上山砍柴，看见两个童子下棋，就停下观看。等棋局终了，斧子柄已经朽烂。回到村里，才发现已经过了上百年，与他同时代的人都去世了。世界已经沧海桑田。

整合包《动画世界：烂柯人》秉持的理念正如烂柯人的典故。故事发生在Minecraft的一个平行现实中。玩家是远古时期的一个普通人，在一次上山砍柴中突然遇到了一只悦灵，回过神来发现时间已经过去了许久，主世界发生了翻天覆地的变化——这是一个比香草世界更为辽阔的天地，参天大树遮天蔽日，平原延绵起伏，裂谷劈开坚实的大地。各种神秘的生物都重返地表，包括巨人、僵尸骑士、骷髅骑射手等。

将玩家带回主世界的是一种古老的生命——悦灵。它们被造物者委为主世界的看守者，而最近灾厄村民的动向让它们不安… 掠夺者们从林地宅邸出发，四处扩张，并且重新打开了另一个世界的门户——下界传送门。上古时期曾染指主世界的势力如今得以卷土重来，玩家需要阻止下界入侵，拯救主世界，并最终明了世界的原委。

---
✅主要特点：

🎨基于官方风格的美学改进，包括：
- 预告片级别的的玩家动画和生物动画！
- 精心挑选的美学材质包，其中包括平衡了视觉观感和性能表现的3D材质；搭配各种动态粒子模组，带来最统一的像素风美学！（使用GTX1650+9代i7测试，默认设置下平均游玩保持在70-110帧）
- 原创设计的RPG风格材质，其中包括粒子效果和盔甲外观
- 来自《我的世界：地下城》和《我的世界：传奇》的元素！
- 深度定制环境动物生成及音频，带来媲美《荒野大镖客2》的绝佳自然听觉体验！
- 幻想风格的操作界面和字体！

⚔️酣畅淋漓的战斗体验
- 原创的敌对生物和敌魁，其中包括僵尸骑士、巨人和巨型史莱姆！
- 灵活的走位操控，包括跑酷
- 持有特定物品/武器时可发动特殊技能！（按“T”使用；除投掷烈焰弹外，均需经验值1级以上才能使用）

|物品/武器            | 特殊技能              |
|:---------------------:|:---------------------:|
| 旋风剑 |旋风斩：击退周围的敌人|
| 烂柯斧  |斧暴：甩出向前冲击的气旋|
| 带有激流附魔的三叉戟 | 唤雨（潜行使用时驱雨） |
| 带有引雷附魔的三叉戟| 在前方召唤数道闪电 |
| 烈焰弹 | 投掷 |
| 功夫秘籍（学习）| 金钟罩：获得完全抗性 |
| 音爆胸甲|音爆：向前发射声波攻击|

🐎流畅的原版骑行体验
- 开局一匹马，抢先体验跑图乐趣！（每匹坐骑都有自己独特的长处）
- 骑马体验前所未有地顺滑，不会无缘无故停步、蹚水时不会被甩下马
- 按“H”吹响马哨，召唤附近的坐骑，致敬《荒野大镖客2》

🏕️奇妙的生物群落和结构可供探索
- 广袤的土地和繁密的植被，形成壮观的自然景观
- 彻底改造平原村庄，这更是我最满意的作品之一！
- 流浪商人营地，可以在此找到有用的工具，如指南针，地图和望远镜
- 更多完善世界观、添加沉浸感的结构，比如亡灵城堡、女巫篷车和猪人营地
- 樱花林中的功夫殿，在此学习功夫“金钟罩”！
- Yung全家桶改造各种冒险结构！
- 众多生物群系中的城镇和塔楼！
- 更多未列出的结构由你来发现

⚙️有趣的调整和新的游戏机制
- 生存早期变得更难。你需要收集材料才能制作工作台
- 碎石头再也不能神奇地变成一整块了。制造石质工具需要先把圆石烧炼成石头！
- 更多有用且合理的制作配方，记得翻一翻你的配方书
- 简洁的群系温度系统，在探索世界的旅途中，你需要注意降温或者保暖御寒
- 你这个年纪你怎么睡得着的？睡不着就点篝火，篝火可以让怪物远离你的营地
- 给你的农牧场经营带来满满动力！收获庄稼能给你带来经验；并且食物放久了会变质，所以过去囤一次粮，不耕地也能吃到天荒地老的时代结束了！
（不妨和你的村民朋友一起经营农牧场，让他们来耕种、喂养）
- 善待你的村民，不要偷他们的财产或把他们关进集中营，否则他们会和你翻脸。为他们打赢劫掠，他们会永远感激你！
- *龙袭*！末影龙会时不时来摧毁你的村庄，直到你前往末地杀死它
- 孵化龙蛋以获得您的龙宝宝！
- 更多乐趣，由你自己发现


🔗链接
- 如果你有任何疑问或者想法，欢迎来动画世界[QQ频道](https://qun.qq.com/qqweb/qunpro/shar?_wv=3&_wwv=128&appChannel=share&inviteCode=20hX1rZzBVB&jumpsource=shorturl#/out)
- 创作过程消耗了我大量的个人时间和精力。如果你愿意在[爱发电](https://afdian.net/a/eugene2000?tab=home)支持一下我，我将不胜感激，并在功夫殿中生成带有您id的赞助者悦灵来感谢您。

💼版权声明
- 该整合包版权受Modrinth保护，禁止在网络平台或社交媒体上传/修改并上传/提取内容并上传，或声称您制作了该整合包。
- 部分原创内容将会上传至Modrinth，敬请期待。
- 如果您用此整合包制作了视频，请在简介处附上此发布页面的链接和[我的bilibili主页](https://space.bilibili.com/190900020)，也欢迎在简介艾特我，我很想看你们的视频！

</details>

The story of "Lankeren" is an ancient Chinese tale. A young woodman encountered two immortals playing chess on the mountain when he was chopping firewood. After watching one game of chess, he astonishingly found that the handle of his axe has rotted, and when he went down the mountain, he realised that hundreds of years had passed——The world has changed.

AnimateCraft: Lankeren grasps the essence of the tale. The story takes place in a parallel existence of vanilla Minecraft. The player is a normal person in the ancient time, and was chopping wood in the forest until an allay showed up. When the player waked up, a long age has passed, and the Overworld has undergone a dramatic change. It has become a vast and expansive realm, with towering trees blocking out the sun, rolling plains, and canyons splitting the solid ground. Various mysterious creatures have returned to the surface, including giants, Zombie Knights, and Skeleton Horseback Archers...

As an ancient species, the allays were appointed by the Creators as guardians of the main world, and the recent activities of the illagers have made them uneasy. Pillagers have emerged from woodland mansions, expanding thoughout the world and re-activated the portals to another world - the Nether. The ancient forces that once tainted the Overworld have now resurfaced, only the player can stop them, save the Overworld, and eventually learn the Whole Story.

---
## ✅Main Features:

### 🎨Aesthetic improvements based on the official-style, including:
- Lively animations of player and mobs, just like those in the trailers!
- Collection of aesthetic texture packs, including 3D textures that balance the performance. Together with mods that add dynamic and unique particles, they make the most beautiful pixel experiences! (Testing with GTX1650+9th i7, in default settings, the average fps is 70-110 fps)
- Original designed RPG-style textures! Including particles and armor
- Designs from Minecraft: Dungeon and Minecraft: Legends!
- Deeply edited ambient mob spawning and soundtrack, bringing immersive audio experience comparable to RDR2! 
- Medieval-style version of C418 music soundtrack!
- Fancy GUI and font!

### ⚔️Epic combat experience
- Original enemies and bosses, including Zombie Knights, Giants, Lost Golems, and Mega Slimes!
- Flexible motion control, including parkour
- Original abilities when holding specific items/weapons! (press "T" to use, at least 1 xp level is reuqired, except throwing fire charges)

| Item/Weapon            | Ability               |
|:---------------------:|:---------------------:|
| Whildwind Sword |Whirlwind: Knock back mobs around|
| Rotten Axe  |Axe Storm: Stike a storm forward and hurt mobs|
| Trident with Riptide enchantment | Summon rain (ShIft+T to Drive rain) |
| Trident with Chanenling enchantment|Summon lightning bolts forward|
| Fire Charge | Throw it forward|
| Kung-Fu Script(Learn) | Golden Bell Shield: Gain Full Resistance |
| Sonic Chestplate| Sonic Boom：A magic sonic beam |
### 🐎Immersive vanilla riding experience like never before!
- Spawn with your mount friend and travel with them! (Each has their own strength)
- Fluent riding! through flat ground and water, no more interruption!
- Press "H" to make a **horse whistle** and call your mount friend, just like that in RDR2!

### 🏕️Marvelous biomes and structures to explore
- Vast land and luxuriant vegetation, bring spectacular natural landscape
- Overhauled plain village, which is one of my favorite works!
- Wandering trader's camp, where you can find useful tools like compass, maps and spyglass
- More original structures to make the game more immersive, includes undead castle, witch's wagon, and piglins' camp.
- Kung-fu Palace in the Cherry groves, where you can learn Kungfu“Golden Bell Shield”!
- Epic overhauled structures by Yung!
- Towns & towers in various biomes!
- More unlisted structures to encounter

### ⚙️Interesting tweaks and new game mechanics

- Harder early game. Find materials to make the crafting table, and try your best to survive the first night.
- Cobble stone will not magically stick together on crafting table anymore, you’ll need to smelt cobbles into stones for crafting stone tools.
- Useful and reasonable crafting recipes, all in your green green recipe book.
- Neat biome-temperature system. find your way to cool down or keep warm on your travels!
- Do not go gentle into that good night! Sleeping is no longer easy, light a campfire if you can't sleep, it helps you to avoid the monsters.
- Farming should be more necessary! Harvesting now brings you experience, while food get spoiled after a day. (Just let your villager friends do the job, sow the seed and breed the animals)
- Build village buildings easily *(currently only available in plains biome)*! by buying the jigsaw block from lv.2  cleric, and **Hold it in main hand and sneak to place it under your feet, then drop a station block on it to generate the corresponding building.** Dropping a emerald will generate you a small house. drop **a bell on the structure block**, a whole village will generate immediately. 
- Treat your villager gently, don't steal their properties or prison them, otherwise they’ll hate you. Save them from a raid and they will remember you!
- **Dragon raid!** the Ender dragon will randomly attack your village until you finish it in the end
- Hatch the dragon egg to get your dragon baby!
- More fun to discover by yourself

---

- If you have any questions or ideas, welcome to tell us on [Discord](https://discord.gg/Cr7qF2quYV)!

- If you make a video about this modpack, please give credit and link to this page, and I would love to watch your videos! Please let me know on Discord.
